views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's hydration progress with a large animated progress ring, quick-add buttons for common container sizes, current streak badge, and a mini hourly distribution chart showing when the user drinks most

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Bottom sheet for logging a drink with container preset buttons that auto-fill amount, beverage type picker with icons, and optional detail fields for temperature and notes

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Scrollable timeline of all entries grouped by date, with a calendar heatmap at the top showing daily completion intensity (color-coded by percentage of goal met), and swipe-to-delete on individual entries

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Deep insights with weekly bar chart comparing intake vs goal, 30-day trend line, beverage type breakdown donut chart, best/worst day highlights, hourly distribution pattern, and personalized hydration insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotalMl
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of amountMl for all entries with today's date

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: todayTotalMl divided by dailyGoalMl, capped at 1.0 for progress ring

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEntries
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries filtered to today, sorted by timeConsumed descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayGlassCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of today's entries as a simple glasses-equivalent metric

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days ending today (or yesterday) where daily total met or exceeded goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Maximum consecutive goal-met days across all recorded history

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverageMl
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily intake in ml over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrendPercent
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change comparing this week's average to previous week's average, positive means improvement

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 7 days of daily totals paired with goal for bar chart rendering

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 30 days of daily totals for trend line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: beverageBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time or current-period breakdown of intake by beverage type for donut chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: hourlyDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: 24-element array showing average ml consumed in each hour of the day, reveals drinking patterns

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of tracked days where daily goal was met, last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bestDayRecord
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Date and amount of the highest single-day intake ever recorded

viewModelComputedProperties.name: caffeineToWaterRatio
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Ratio of caffeinated beverage ml to total ml this week, flags if too high

viewModelComputedProperties.name: hydrationInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of computed personalized insights: streak status, trend direction, best drinking hour, caffeine ratio warning, weekend vs weekday comparison, goal adjustment suggestion

dailyGoal.description: Recommended daily water intake based on general health guidelines. Default 2500ml (about 8 standard glasses). User can customize in settings. The system should suggest adjustments based on actual consumption patterns — if user consistently exceeds goal by 20%+, suggest raising it; if consistently under 50%, suggest a more achievable intermediate goal.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as 'active' if the user's total intake meets or exceeds 80% of their daily goal (not 100%, to be forgiving of near-misses). Streak resets if a day falls below 80%. Streak continues through days with no entries only if the gap is a single day (grace period for forgetting to log).
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track three trend dimensions: (1) Volume trend — 7-day rolling average compared to previous 7-day period, expressed as percentage change. (2) Consistency trend — standard deviation of daily intake over rolling 14 days, lower is better. (3) Timing trend — whether the user is front-loading hydration (morning) vs back-loading (evening), with a nudge toward even distribution throughout the day.
insights: Weekly trend direction with specific ml change ('You drank 340ml more per day this week')
Caffeine ratio alert if caffeinated drinks exceed 40% of total intake
Weekend vs weekday comparison ('You drink 30% less on weekends')
Peak hydration hour identification ('You hydrate most between 2-3 PM')
Consistency score based on daily variance ('Very consistent this week — only ±150ml variation')
Beverage diversity insight ('Try mixing in more plain water — 60% of your intake is coffee')
Goal adjustment suggestion based on 14-day rolling average vs current goal
Morning hydration check ('You averaged only 200ml before noon — try starting earlier')
Personal best notifications when breaking daily or weekly records
